MAIN-PROCEDURE.purpose: Open account file, handle main menu, route to account creation or login, then close file.

CREATE-ACCOUNT.purpose: Collect name, age, PIN; validate inputs; generate account number; create account record.

GENERATE-ACCOUNT.purpose: Generate random account number and retry if it already exists.

LOGIN.purpose: Read account, validate existence and PIN, then enter ATM menu until logout.

ATM-MENU.purpose: Show post-login menu and route to balance, deposit, withdraw, or logout.

DEPOSIT.purpose: Accept positive deposit amount, add it to balance, and update account record.

WITHDRAW.purpose: Accept positive withdrawal amount, check sufficient balance, subtract it, and update account record if valid.
